Back to Schools

School on Mathematics for Physics 1: Operators on Hilbert Spaces

Register

Schedule: 1 May - 5 July 2026

Registration deadline: 25 April 2026

Timing: Lectures and homework sessions run in Bangladesh Standard Time, typically 7:00 PM - 9:00 PM.

Instructor

Onirban Islam

Postdoctoral Researcher, Institute for Mathematics, University of Potsdam, Germany

Abstract

This short course is intended to offer a gentle introduction to unbounded operators on Hilbert spaces pertinent to quantum mechanics. Our starting point will be to point out the differences between operators on finite-dimensional and infinite-dimensional Hilbert spaces, and to understand why the latter is essential for formulating quantum mechanics in a mathematically rigorous fashion. We will begin with the basics of unbounded operators on Hilbert spaces and rigged Hilbert spaces in order to explain the standard Heisenberg matrix mechanics and Dirac bra-ket formalisms. Our aim is to comprehend the quantum mechanical simple harmonic oscillator and its spectrum from an operator-theoretic viewpoint. A rudimentary background in linear algebra is assumed, although a few topics will be recalled in due course in order to motivate the analysis in an infinite-dimensional Hilbert space setting.

This school introduces operator-theoretic methods that are central to a rigorous treatment of quantum mechanics. It is designed for students who want a careful bridge from finite-dimensional linear algebra to the infinite-dimensional Hilbert space setting used in modern quantum theory.

Course Outline and Schedule

Session Topic Date and time (BST) Lecturer / Speaker
L01 Finite-dimensional Hilbert Spaces 01/05/2026, 7:00 PM - 9:00 PM Onirban Islam
L02 Infinite-dimensional Hilbert Spaces 02/05/2026, 7:00 PM - 9:00 PM Onirban Islam
L03 Bounded Operators 03/05/2026, 7:00 PM - 9:00 PM Onirban Islam
T01 Tutorial Session 09/05/2026, 7:00 PM - 9:00 PM To be announced
L04 Unbounded Operators 15/05/2026, 7:00 PM - 9:00 PM Onirban Islam
L05 Self-adjoint Operators 16/05/2026, 7:00 PM - 9:00 PM Onirban Islam
T02 Tutorial Session 23/05/2026, 7:00 PM - 9:00 PM To be announced
L06 Spectrum 30/05/2026, 7:00 PM - 9:00 PM Onirban Islam
L07 Spectral Theorem - I 31/05/2026, 7:00 PM - 9:00 PM Onirban Islam
L08 Spectral Theorem - II 05/06/2026, 7:00 PM - 9:00 PM Onirban Islam
L09 Spectral Theorem - III 06/06/2026, 7:00 PM - 9:00 PM Onirban Islam
T03 Tutorial Session 07/06/2026, 7:00 PM - 9:00 PM To be announced
L10 Algebraic and Topological Duals 12/06/2026, 7:00 PM - 9:00 PM Onirban Islam
L11 Gelfand Triplet and Dirac Bra-ket Formalism 13/06/2026, 7:00 PM - 9:00 PM Onirban Islam
L12 Position and Momentum Operators in Quantum Mechanics 14/06/2026, 7:00 PM - 9:00 PM Onirban Islam
L13 Canonical Commutation Relations in Quantum Mechanics 19/06/2026, 7:00 PM - 9:00 PM Onirban Islam
T04 Tutorial Session 21/06/2026, 7:00 PM - 9:00 PM To be announced
L14 One-parameter Group of Unitary Operators 03/07/2026, 7:00 PM - 9:00 PM Onirban Islam
L15 Spectral Theory of a Quantum Harmonic Oscillator 04/07/2026, 7:00 PM - 9:00 PM Onirban Islam
L16 Trace-class Operators and Partition Function of a Quantum Harmonic Oscillator 05/07/2026, 7:00 PM - 9:00 PM Onirban Islam
